query: Analyze budget allocation by product category and cost trends, then recommend reallocation strategy.

step_1_sql.query: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, AVG(amount_usd) AS avg_transaction FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY product ORDER BY total_spend DESC

step_2_consumer.task: For each product, recommend allocation shift: increase if high-spend (>$500 total), maintain if medium ($200-500), decrease if low (<$200)
